src: Entity Framework EF Core efcore Bulk Batch Extensions with BulkCopy in .Net for Insert Update Delete Read (CRUD), Truncate and SaveChanges operations on SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, Oracle
ja: SQL Server・PostgreSQL・MySQL・SQLite・OracleでのInsert・Update・Delete・Read（CRUD）・Truncate・SaveChanges操作をBulkCopyで実現する、.Net向けEntity Framework EF Core efcore バルク・バッチ拡張機能
